---
name: Documentation change
about: Propose additions, corrections, or improvements to project documentation
labels: documentation
---

## Summary

Describe the documentation issue or requested improvement.

## Current Location

Specify where the current documentation lives (file path or section).

## Proposed Change

Describe the exact content or structure change you want.

## Target Audience

Who benefits from this update?

- [ ] New contributors
- [ ] Existing maintainers
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Other:

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The intended section is updated
- [ ] Examples/commands are accurate
- [ ] Terminology is consistent with repository conventions
- [ ] Links and references are valid

## Additional Context

Include references, screenshots, or related issue links if helpful.
